frontmatter.title: Omar Abdelrahim
frontmatter.description: Since I was 12, I always had a dream to stand in a class and teach people something that could change their future. English now is number ONE skill that's needed for any purpose in life, especially for WORK. I helped people improve their future, I'm helping people change to the better and I'll keep helping people until my clock stops.For commercial contact, please contact this email address: omar.alaa@live.com
